history.created_by: RUN |3 UID=1000 GID=1000 OPENSEARCH_HOME=/usr/share/opensearch /bin/sh -c dnf update --releasever=latest -y && dnf install -y tar gzip shadow-utils which && dnf clean all # buildkit
RUN |3 UID=1000 GID=1000 OPENSEARCH_HOME=/usr/share/opensearch /bin/sh -c groupadd -g $GID opensearch &&     adduser -u $UID -g $GID -d $OPENSEARCH_HOME opensearch # buildkit

RUN |3 UID=1000 GID=1000 OPENSEARCH_HOME=/usr/share/opensearch /bin/sh -c echo "export JAVA_HOME=$OPENSEARCH_HOME/jdk" >> /etc/profile.d/java_home.sh &&     echo "export PATH=\$PATH:\$JAVA_HOME/bin" >> /etc/profile.d/java_home.sh &&     ls -l $OPENSEARCH_HOME # buildkit
RUN |5 UID=1000 GID=1000 OPENSEARCH_HOME=/usr/share/opensearch DISABLE_INSTALL_DEMO_CONFIG=true DISABLE_SECURITY_PLUGIN=false /bin/sh -c ./opensearch-onetime-setup.sh # buildkit

LABEL org.label-schema.schema-version=1.0 org.label-schema.name=opensearch org.label-schema.version=3.7.0 org.label-schema.url=https://opensearch.org org.label-schema.vcs-url=https://github.com/opensearch-project/OpenSearch org.label-schema.license=Apache-2.0 org.label-schema.vendor=OpenSearch org.label-schema.description=11986 org.label-schema.build-date=2026-07-15T19:34:49Z DOCKERFILE=https://github.com/opensearch-project/opensearch-build/blob/main/docker/release/dockerfiles/opensearch.al2.dockerfile

RUN /bin/sh -c if command -v microdnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then       microdnf upgrade -y && microdnf clean all;     elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then       yum upgrade -y && yum clean all;     elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then       dnf upgrade -y && dnf clean all;     fi # buildkit

RUN /bin/sh -c rm -f /usr/share/opensearch/lib/jackson-databind-*.jar     /usr/share/opensearch/modules/ingest-geoip/jackson-databind-*.jar     /usr/share/opensearch/plugins/opensearch-sql/jackson-databind-*.jar     && cp /tmp/jackson-databind-2.21.4.jar /usr/share/opensearch/lib/     && cp /tmp/jackson-databind-2.21.4.jar /usr/share/opensearch/modules/ingest-geoip/     && cp /tmp/jackson-databind-2.21.4.jar /usr/share/opensearch/plugins/opensearch-sql/     && cp /tmp/jackson-databind-3.1.4.jar /usr/share/opensearch/lib/     && rm -f /tmp/jackson-databind-*.jar # buildkit
